official_sources.name: NLnet NGI Zero Commons Fund Eligibility information

checked_claim: ClaimBound public materials can be mapped to selected NLnet eligible activity categories under a frozen manual checklist, without claiming NLnet approval, funding likelihood, legal eligibility or endorsement.

manual_mapping.nlnet_category: design and development of free and open source software and open hardware
manual_mapping.claimbound_material: ClaimBound public repository and evidence-card workflow
manual_mapping.boundary: Does not prove adoption, funding approval or technical superiority.

manual_mapping.nlnet_category: validation or constructive inquiry into existing or novel technical solutions
manual_mapping.claimbound_material: source-audit cards, negative/blocked statuses, protocol-bound checks
manual_mapping.boundary: Only validates the existence of a bounded evidence-check workflow.

manual_mapping.nlnet_category: software engineering aimed at adapting to new usage areas or improving software quality
manual_mapping.claimbound_material: validators, registry checks, evidence-card schema discipline
manual_mapping.boundary: Does not replace tests, CI, code review or security audit.

manual_mapping.nlnet_category: documentation for researchers, developers and end users, including educational materials
manual_mapping.claimbound_material: README, getting-started flow, manual/AI protocol docs, audience guidance
manual_mapping.boundary: Documentation fit does not prove reviewer acceptance.

manual_mapping.nlnet_category: other activities relevant to robust software development and deployment practices
manual_mapping.claimbound_material: family ledger, claim boundaries, status rules, raw-payload policy and public registry
manual_mapping.boundary: This is process evidence, not certification.

manual_mapping.claimbound_material: protocol/family/registry discipline for tracking what was promised, checked and limited
manual_mapping.boundary: Does not prove project delivery capacity by itself.

forbidden_claims: ClaimBound is legally or finally eligible.
ClaimBound is better than every manual review process.
known_limitations: The private submitted NLnet application text is not committed or fully audited in this public card.
The result is a funding-fit self-check, not a grant decision.
The mapping can drift if NLnet changes the eligibility page after the access date.
The card is single-operator and not independently reproduced.
